css: body{font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:10pt;color:#1e293b;margin:0;padding:0;}.hdr{background:#0f2347;color:#fff;padding:20px 24px 14px;}.hdr-org{font-size:7pt;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7f9abf;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px;}.hdr-title{font-size:16pt;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}.hdr-num{font-size:22pt;font-weight:900;color:#c9a96e;line-height:1;}.hdr-sub{font-size:8pt;color:#7f9abf;margin-top:2px;}.gold-bar{height:5px;background:#c9a96e;}.meta-bar{background:#eef2f8;border-bottom:1px solid #cdd7e6;padding:10px 24px;}table.meta-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}table.meta-tbl td{vertical-align:top;padding:0 8px;}.ml{font-size:7pt;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:2px;}.mv{font-size:10pt;font-weight:600;color:#0f2347;}.body-wrap{padding:0 4px;}.section{font-size:7.5pt;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#0f2347;border-bottom:2px solid #c9a96e;padding-bottom:4px;margin:18px 0 10px;}table.fg{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-bottom:4px;}table.fg tr:nth-child(odd){background:#f8fafc;}table.fg td{vertical-align:top;padding:6px 8px;}td.fl{font-size:7pt;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#64748b;width:19%;}td.fv{font-size:9.5pt;font-weight:500;color:#1e293b;width:31%;border-right:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding-right:16px;}td.fv-last{font-size:9.5pt;font-weight:500;color:#1e293b;width:31%;}.badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 9px;border-radius:3px;font-size:8pt;font-weight:700;}.b-final{background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;border:1px solid #86efac;}.b-pending{background:#fef9c3;color:#854d0e;border:1px solid #fde047;}.b-open{background:#dbeafe;color:#1e3a8a;border:1px solid #93c5fd;}.b-grey{background:#f1f5f9;color:#475569;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;}.je-hero{font-size:18pt;font-weight:900;color:#0f2347;line-height:1;}.narr{background:#f8fafc;border-left:3px solid #c9a96e;padding:8px 12px;font-size:9pt;color:#334155;margin:8px 0 12px;}table.amt-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}table.amt-tbl td{padding:4px 6px;width:25%;}.amt-box{border:1px solid #d1d9e6;border-radius:3px;padding:8px 12px;background:#f8fafc;}.amt-dr{border-top:3px solid #dc2626;}.amt-cr{border-top:3px solid #16a34a;}.amt-cur{font-size:7pt;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;}.amt-val{font-size:13pt;font-weight:800;color:#0f2347;}table.dtbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:9pt;}table.dtbl th{background:#0f2347;color:#fff;padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:7.5pt;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;}table.dtbl td{border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding:5px 10px;vertical-align:top;color:#334155;}table.dtbl tr:nth-child(even) td{background:#f8fafc;}.footer{margin-top:24px;padding:6px 0;border-top:1px solid #d1d9e6;font-size:7.5pt;color:#94a3b8;}
html:

Date {{ frappe.format(doc.date, {'fieldtype': 'Date'}) if doc.date else '—' }} Created By {{ doc.created_by or '—' }}
Status {% if doc.status == 'final' %}{{ doc.status }} {% elif doc.status %}{{ doc.status }} {% else %}open{% endif %} Status 2 {% if doc.final_status2 == 'final2' %}{{ doc.final_status2 }} {% elif doc.final_status2 %}{{ doc.final_status2 }} {% else %}—{% endif %}
System Date {{ frappe.format(doc.system_date, {'fieldtype': 'Datetime'}) if doc.system_date else '—' }} Year {{ doc.year or '—' }}

name: Cash Document Print
